name: Neverwinter
summary: A resilient northern city of warm river mists, rebuilding streets, noble intrigues and looming wilderness beyond its walls.
politics: Lord Neverember’s influence remains strong, though old noble families and merchant interests compete quietly.
Rebuilding districts create opportunity for adventurers, criminals and ambitious factions.
culture: Artisans, mercenaries and refugees mingle in rebuilt streets.
The city values order, trade and visible prosperity after years of disaster.
